title: cyperus pelophilus
intro: Cyperus pelophilus, also known as the Swamp Pump or Marsh Pump Sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its high content of essential oils and other bioactive compounds. In traditional medicine, Cyperus pelophilus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in herbal teas, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its health benefits.
